name: Berry Floral Button Blouse
description: Rich berry-toned blouse with delicate pink cherry blossom print. Long sleeves, notch neckline with button placket. Lightweight and feminine.

name: White Floral Peplum Cami
description: Elegant white camisole with soft pink and grey floral print. V-neckline with front tie detail and flowing peplum hem. Adjustable spaghetti straps.

name: Pink Floral Ruffle Crop Top
description: Playful pink floral crop top with tiered ruffle layers. Tie-strap shoulders with a sweet romantic vibe. Perfect for summer outings.
alt_text: Pink Floral Ruffle Crop Top - Front

name: Lilac Floral V-Neck Blouse
description: Soft lilac blouse with hand-drawn floral sketches. Relaxed V-neckline and bishop sleeves with cuff detail. Effortlessly chic.

name: Garden Ditsy Sweetheart Top
description: Charming multicolour ditsy floral top with sweetheart neckline and wide straps. Fitted bodice with a garden-fresh appeal.

name: Golden Paisley Off-Shoulder Top
description: Stunning golden yellow off-shoulder top with white paisley print. Puff sleeves and cinched waist with tie front peplum detail.

name: Navy Tropical Cold Shoulder Top
description: Bold navy top with vibrant pink and orange tropical floral print. Cold-shoulder ruffled sleeves and relaxed silhouette.
alt_text: Navy Tropical Cold Shoulder Top - Front

name: Cream Ditsy Corset Top
description: Dainty cream corset-style top with tiny floral print. Adjustable shoulder straps and front tie detail. Structured and flattering.

name: White Botanical Peasant Blouse
description: Airy white peasant blouse with subtle botanical sprig print. Gathered neckline with tie, balloon sleeves. Relaxed bohemian style.

name: Navy Boho Contrast Tunic
description: Sleeveless navy tunic with red and white ditsy floral yoke and contrasting print body. Handkerchief hem for effortless boho style.

name: Green Polka Ruffle V-Neck Blouse
description: Fresh green blouse with white polka dot print. Ruffle V-neckline and puff half-sleeves. Cheerful and easy to style.
alt_text: Green Polka Ruffle V-Neck Blouse - Front

name: Blue Polka Dot V-Neck Blouse
description: Classic blue blouse with playful white polka dots. V-neckline with three-quarter balloon sleeves. Smart-casual versatility.
alt_text: Blue Polka Dot V-Neck Blouse - Front

name: Purple Watercolor Peplum Blouse
description: Artistic purple and blue watercolour print blouse with gathered empire waist. Long bell sleeves add a dreamy bohemian touch.

name: Monochrome Lattice Shell Top
description: Sleek black and white geometric lattice print shell top with notch neckline. Red Greek key hem band adds a designer-inspired accent.

name: White Pleated Ruffle Top
description: Ethereal white pleated top with layered ruffle overlay at neckline. Sheer crinkle fabric for an elegant airy feel.

name: Black Tropical Tie-Front Top
description: Sultry black bralette-style tie-front top with vivid tropical floral print. Spaghetti straps and centre knot. Perfect holiday piece.

name: Pink Aztec Boho Blouse
description: Warm pink boho blouse with intricate Aztec geometric print. V-neckline with tassel ties and relaxed bell sleeves.

name: Coral Cap Sleeve Tee
description: Simple and chic coral pink cap-sleeve tee with round neckline and curved hem. Soft cotton blend for everyday comfort.
